title: Greater Amarite Disc
description: There aren’t enough amarite disc texture packs: so I’m fixing that.
body:
# Greater Amarite Discs

I've noticed that over the few years that amarite has existed: there are pleant of texture packs for it, but almost none of them change the disc, not this time!

This is a simple texture pack to form the once frisbee-like, non threatening amarite disc, into an obviously life threatening thorned chakram.

This mod is one of a few that I'm making for the amarite mod.

why is there a second texture in the files?

1. stay out of there! you have no need to be poking around in my packs.
2. I am slowly improving my art style, so there may be more textures there than the on that's in use.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
